description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Release that runs on workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on push to release branches with specific paths and tags. Configure a docker job with write permissions to id-token and contents, then check out the repository with the given commit or tag. Configure AWS credentials, login to the AWS registry, configure GCP credentials, and login to the GCP registry. Build Docker images with a specific tag generated from a VERSION file, then push the images to AWS, DockerHub, and GCP registries.
